pull.title: [Kernel] Fix conflicting macro names for gguf kernels
pull.body:
Just realized that the names for MoE macros are conflicting with MMQ ones at https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm/blob/4f044b1d67964e53587a4d0c7f00233a04b7be4e/csrc/quantization/gguf/mmq.cuh#L112 

Not an issue at the moment because they are the same but might cause bugs in the future
